010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.html;
018
019import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
020
021/**
022 * Serializes POJOs to HTTP responses as stripped HTML.
023 *
024 * <h5 class='topic'>Media types</h5>
025 *
026 * Handles <c>Accept</c> types:  <bc>text/html+stripped</bc>
027 * <p>
028 * Produces <c>Content-Type</c> types:  <bc>text/html</bc>
029 *
030 * <h5 class='topic'>Description</h5>
031 *
032 * Produces the same output as {@link HtmlDocSerializer}, but without the header and body tags and page title and
033 * description.
034 * Used primarily for JUnit testing the {@link HtmlDocSerializer} class.
035 *
036 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
037 *    <li class='note'>This class is thread safe and reusable.
038 * </ul>
039 *
040 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
041 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/HtmlSupport">HTML Basics</a>
042
043 * </ul>
044 */
045@SuppressWarnings({
046   "java:S110" // Inheritance depth acceptable for HtmlStrippedDocSerializer hierarchy
047})
048public class HtmlStrippedDocSerializer extends HtmlSerializer {
049
050   /**
051    * Builder class.
052    */
053   @SuppressWarnings({
054      "java:S119" // 'SELF' (CRTP self-type) is intentional and clearer than a single-letter name.
055   })
056   public abstract static class Builder<SELF extends Builder<SELF>> extends HtmlSerializer.Builder<SELF> {
057
058      private static final Cache<HashKey,HtmlStrippedDocSerializer> CACHE = Cache.of(HashKey.class, HtmlStrippedDocSerializer.class).build();
059
060      /**
061       * Constructor, default settings.
062       */
063      protected Builder() {
064         produces("text/html");
065         accept("text/html+stripped");
066      }
067
068      /**
069       * Copy constructor.
070       *
071       * @param copyFrom The builder to copy from.
072       */
073      protected Builder(Builder<?> copyFrom) {
074         super(copyFrom);
075      }
076
077      /**
078       * Copy constructor.
079       *
080       * @param copyFrom The bean to copy from.
081       */
082      protected Builder(HtmlStrippedDocSerializer copyFrom) {
083         super(copyFrom);
084      }
085
086      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
087      public HtmlStrippedDocSerializer build() {
088         return cache(CACHE).build(HtmlStrippedDocSerializer.class);
089      }
090
091      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
092      public abstract SELF copy();
093
094
095   }
096
097   /**
098    * Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed {@link HtmlStrippedDocSerializer#create()} / {@link HtmlStrippedDocSerializer#copy()} path.
099    */
100   public static final class DefaultBuilder extends Builder<DefaultBuilder> {
101
102      DefaultBuilder() {}
103
104      DefaultBuilder(HtmlStrippedDocSerializer copyFrom) {
105         super(copyFrom);
106      }
107
108      DefaultBuilder(Builder<?> copyFrom) {
109         super(copyFrom);
110      }
111
112      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
113      public DefaultBuilder copy() {
114         return new DefaultBuilder(this);
115      }
116   }
117
118   /** Default serializer, all default settings. */
119   public static final HtmlStrippedDocSerializer DEFAULT = new HtmlStrippedDocSerializer(create());
120
121   /**
122    * Creates a new builder for this object.
123    *
124    * @return A new builder.
125    */
126   @SuppressWarnings({
127      "java:S1452" // Builder<?> wildcard return intentional; callers chain via fluent API without needing the concrete type
128   })
129   public static Builder<?> create() {
130      return new DefaultBuilder();
131   }
132
133   /**
134    * Constructor.
135    *
136    * @param builder The builder for this object.
137    */
138   public HtmlStrippedDocSerializer(Builder<?> builder) {
139      super(builder);
140   }
141
142   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
143   public Builder<?> copy() {
144      return new DefaultBuilder(this);
145   }
146
147   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
148   public HtmlStrippedDocSerializerSession.Builder<?> createSession() {
149      return HtmlStrippedDocSerializerSession.create(this);
150   }
151
152   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
153   public HtmlStrippedDocSerializerSession getSession() { return createSession().build(); }
154}
